toolsWalletAddress.tooltip.message: Connecting your wallet allows us to save your custom layouts, link them to you as the original author, and verify ownership for future updates.
toolsWalletAddress.tooltip.message2: It also enables Web Monetization on your behalf by embedding your wallet address into your web page automatically.
toolsWalletAddress.errors.connectionError: You have not connected your wallet address yet.
toolsWalletAddress.status.connect: If you're connecting your wallet address for the first time, you'll start with the default layout. You can then customize and save your layout as needed.
toolsWalletAddress.status.noSavedProfiles: There are no custom edits for the {{toolName}} correlated to this wallet address but you can start customizing when you want.
toolsWalletAddress.status.profilesFetched: We've loaded your layouts. Feel free to keep customizing your {{toolName}} to fit your style.

paywall.title: Pay per Article
paywall.description_1: Pay Per Article lets visitors unlock gated content with a one-time payment.
paywall.description_2: It provides a clean, customizable interface to configure pricing, and choose how locked content is revealed.
paywall.section.settings.title: Settings
paywall.inputgroup.price.title: Price
paywall.inputgroup.price.desc: Set the one-time payment amount visitors pay to unlock this page’s gated content.
paywall.input.price.label: Amount
paywall.inputgroup.placement.title: Paywall placement
paywall.inputgroup.placement.desc: Choose how much of the page the paywall covers, and when it appears to the visitor.
paywall.input.coverage.label: Coverage on the page
paywall.input.coverage.hint: How much of the screen the paywall takes when it appears.
paywall.input.delay.label: Show paywall after
paywall.input.delay.hint: Set to 0 to show the paywall immediately on page load.
paywall.input.message.label: Subtitle
paywall.input.message.hint: Explain the value in one sentence.
paywall.input.message.placeholder: Unlock the full article with a one-time payment — no subscription, no account.
paywall.input.payButton.label: Pay button label
